text:
I think a story about a squirrel would work.

It was a sunny day in the forest, and little squirrel Barry went on an adventure to find the golden acorn. He scurried through the trees, his bushy tail swayingly back-and-forth. He found a family of squirrels eating breakfast.

"Hey there," said a squirrel with eyes like shiny eggs.

"I could eat something," thought Barry.

The squirrel nodded earnestly.

Suddenly Barry thought about peanut butter.

"I'll have one of those," he said impulsively.

The squirrel nodded again.

Then Barry thought about his own favorite nutty treat.

"Peanut butter is silly," he thought.

Then he remembered a trick!

"Sure, I get peanut butter," Barry said confidently.

The squirrel watched the little squirrel go off to get some food. When he came back, Barry had his mouth all wide open!

"Huh?" Barry said.

"A keyring."<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
